hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git\s+push'; then superx-state check-quality-gates; fi

if [ -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state mark-dirty 2>/dev/null || true; fi; count=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); if [ "$count" -ge 5 ] && [ -d .git ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "superx: auto-checkpoint ($count files)" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if [ ! -f superx-state.json ]; then superx-state init 2>/dev/null || true; fi; if [ -f .planning/STATE.md ]; then echo "[superx] Resuming from .planning/STATE.md — read it for prior context."; fi
if [ -d .git ] && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "superx: session-end checkpoint" --no-verify 2>/dev/null || true; fi
